clean_body: We need fresh ideas to build equity. | | | | Peter, We must have fresh ideas to build equity. That is what I'm running for the U.S. Senate. It is time that we have fresh ideas for a better Washington. We need fresh ideas on police reform, we need new ideas on how to get to education equity, and we must have fresh ideas to combat climate change. Together we can ensure that police officers are adequately trained, thoroughly screened for bias, and have the correct police on the streets to protect and support the community. That is why I am proposing a two-year training period for police, anti-bias training and testing, comprehensive background investigations on each officer, and tearing down the blue wall. We must have the courage to fight for change, and if we want real action we must embrace fresh ideas. I am ready to take the challenge of fighting for our bold changes and our fresh ideas. Please join me in the fight and donate today! | "Donate $50" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you, Nicolaus Sleister Our mailing address is: CITIZENS FOR NICOLAUS SLEISTER 17404 Meridian East, Suite F #256 Puyallup, Washington 98375 Copyright © 2020 CITIZENS FOR NICOLAUS SLEISTER, All rights reserved. | Why Is Andrew Cuomo Still Governor of New York?
Rob Ortt | July 30, 2021
---
| What's that adage about a leopard and its spots?
Last spring, Governor Andrew Cuomo became a national media darling through his daily COVID-19 briefings and primetime "interviews" with his CNN-anchor brother. It may be hard to believe now, but around this time last year, there was even speculation that Cuomo could replace then-candidate Biden on the 2020 ballot.
Then the bottom fell out, and Cuomo went from a hero of the pandemic to the target of multiple federal and state investigations. For those of us who know him, his fall from grace was no surprise.
First, there was the nursing-home scandal, in which Governor Cuomo deliberately undercounted the number of seniors who died due to his directive placing COVID-positive residents back into understaffed, underequipped nursing homes -- and then misled New Yorkers and federal officials about it. Estimates suggest that as many as 15,000 New York seniors due to his actions. Worse yet, while covering up these deaths, he took a cool $5.1 million to write a book touting his COVID leadership and then allegedly used state staff and resources to produce this propaganda piece. One needn't be a skeptic to link the timing of the deal to the cover-up of the scandal.
[Read the full piece online here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zSFjPP6353LgkwIX1FYZ88K20PIiUkfS9cv4QHvi3a_3c6mf3AYE92PK7XS-sEK5IToBf7w8NyBQeftB1sbgIiDiM7sNbcNTaxmzbZvj5xirAmrkQdkULsIzt3yspY2mdYMU2HHagqECFmghe3tu_6q9xKM4YX48kBpde8g6-QIPcCZLQatIEIAVafx2by1U6bkbdIN9SbR6o_Z5rfEjjnLfCQIcBctYfq0Xll-VElg=&c=Uoa_LXXIr53uFi_JlSguTTFQykEb83HEgaAxpLzjO3lC2rhw4_42IQ==&ch=bVwnVEXX5ONCdS_VHH2UcPpjKJwA6F6ILDEG05C_ZLzGbQum0yEX_g==)

All the progress we’ve made over the last few years is also on the ballot. Democrats in Virginia have been an example for the rest of the country: flipping Congressional districts Republicans have held for decades, winning statewide elections by record margins, taking the General Assembly, and passing landmark legislation on a number of issues. But that progress could be undone in November if we don’t elect Democrats up and down the ballot. That’s why I’m asking for your support -- not just for me, but for the Democratic Party of Virginia as well. **_[Will you make a split donation right now and join me in supporting DPVA?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33418602/298818886/-974236957?refcode=mw_em_210802_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzJhNWVlMy1kOWYzLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IdAa0M15Yyt5q8mUXweUGYu_GDrMwWgVSlONPbtnhpA=)_** I’m teaming up with the DPVA to make sure each and every Democratic candidate in Virginia has the resources they need to win. clean_body: There’s a lot on the ballot this year. | | | Derek, There’s a lot on the ballot this year. This election isn’t just about the candidates running to represent you. All the progress we’ve made over the last few years is also on the ballot. Democrats in Virginia have been an example for the rest of the country: flipping Congressional districts Republicans have held for decades, winning statewide elections by record margins, taking the General Assembly, and passing landmark legislation on a number of issues. But that progress could be undone in November if we don’t elect Democrats up and down the ballot. That’s why I’m asking for your support -- not just for me, but for the Democratic Party of Virginia as well. = I’m teaming up with the DPVA to make sure each and every Democratic candidate in Virginia has the resources they need to win. This is where you come in, Derek. We have the power to keep Virginia blue and move our Commonwealth -- and our country -- forward. But we’re counting on our supporters like you. = Thank you for all of your support, Mark Warner = * | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Hi Peter, thank you for your support of my campaign. I am so proud of what we’re building together and you should be, too. That’s why I’m asking you to become an even bigger part of our campaign with your personal endorsement:

[**I’d love to include your name on our Official Community Endorsements page -- it’ll feature Wisconsinites from Eau Claire to Marinette and Superior to Kenosha who believe in what we’re building and want to show their support for it. Will you add your name today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33418926/298819808/-589298804?gpsid=31_130_20021&ms=em21_210802_eomtyV2_engg_gq_act__sg_ettx&refcode=em21_210802_eomtyV2_engg_gq_act__sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210802_eomtyV2_engg_gq_act__sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWZlMmFlNS1kYWYzLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LVnDn8QeotZPafnFZNH0MAl-atNoBI4R6lCftwFvkzM=&emci=90394267-acf3-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=9afe2ae5-daf3-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18659593)

We are building a movement for all of Wisconsin with support from every corner of our beautiful state because this is a campaign where we show people our values, not just say the words.

Over the past few weeks alone, we’ve met folks at coffee shops, breweries, picnics, and county fairs. Today, we’re in Brown County. Over the weekend, we were in Marathon. Last week, we were in Washburn and Bayfield -- with great conversations (and a whole lot of cheese curds!) at every stop.

Thanks to thousands of grassroots donors, our campaign has the resources to travel the state to talk with folks about the kitchen table issues that matter most -- like universal health care, good-paying union jobs, clean air and water, and so much more.

So, whether folks like you filled out one of our surveys, shared our posts on social media, or even forwarded these emails to your loved ones, I’m so grateful for all that you’ve chosen to do to support our campaign so far. And right now, I’m personally asking you to take the next step:

[**Would you consider endorsing our grassroots campaign for U.S. Senate? You can click right here to sign your name -- and let me know if you’d like to be included on our community endorsements page. It would mean a great deal to me.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33418927/298819809/-589298804?gpsid=31_130_20021&ms=em21_210802_eomtyV2_engg_gq_act__sg_ettx&refcode=em21_210802_eomtyV2_engg_gq_act__sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210802_eomtyV2_engg_gq_act__sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWZlMmFlNS1kYWYzLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LVnDn8QeotZPafnFZNH0MAl-atNoBI4R6lCftwFvkzM=&emci=90394267-acf3-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=9afe2ae5-daf3-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18659593)

This race could be determined by only a handful of votes, Peter, which means we can’t take anything for granted. It’s the people on the ground who talk to their neighbors, organize their communities, and spread the word about this Senate race that will be the reason we win this thing -- and supporters like you are a critical part of our plan.

Please consider adding your personal endorsement for our campaign today and let’s spread the word about the movement we’re building together. Thanks again for everything.

Forward!

Sarah Godlewski

[ENDORSE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33418928/298819810/-589298804?gpsid=31_130_20021&ms=em21_210802_eomtyV2_engg_gq_act__sg_ettx&refcode=em21_210802_eomtyV2_engg_gq_act__sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210802_eomtyV2_engg_gq_act__sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWZlMmFlNS1kYWYzLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LVnDn8QeotZPafnFZNH0MAl-atNoBI4R6lCftwFvkzM=&emci=90394267-acf3-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=9afe2ae5-daf3-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18659593)

name: Dean Heller
subject: RSVP: August 13 in Incline Village
body:
I wanted to send you a personal invite to join us on Friday, August 13 in
Incline Village for a reception in support of Senator Tom Cotton.

Peter,

I want to personally invite you to join me, Adam Laxalt, and Florida Governor
Ron DeSantis on Friday, August 13 in Incline Village for a reception in support
of US Senator Tom Cotton.

Nevadans care deeply about conservative values, limited government, and a
strong defense. That’s why we need people like Tom Cotton in the Senate.

It will also be great to hear from a rock-solid, conservative governor like
Ron DeSantis who has truly led the way in Florida for the rest of the country
to follow. It's going to be an event you don't want to miss!

<mailto:khueter@khueter.com?subject=RSVP:%20Friday,%20Aug.%2013%20>

I hope you can join us.

Sincerely,

Dean Heller

body:

|

| | **Friend, it 's bad enough that Ron DeSantis has utterly failed as governor of Florida, but all signs indicate that he's planning to _run for president_.

We can't let him bring his toxic brand of politics to the White House -- rush a contribution now so we can end his political career in 2022 before he gets the chance to run in 2024:** | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Ron DeSantis just might be the worst governor in America. But don't take our word for it -- check out his record for yourself:
❌ He's a **hyper-partisan who owes his gubernatorial victory to Donald Trump 's endorsement** \-- to return the favor, he's willing to say or do whatever it takes to keep Donald Trump happy.
❌ Throughout the pandemic, he **opposed stimulus checks, tax cuts, and aid for local governments** , despite _overwhelming support_ from Floridians.
❌ He's stoked **anti-science sentiment** and banned businesses from requiring vaccines to protect their customers and employees.
❌ Because of low vaccination rates, **Florida is now the epicenter of the COVID-19 pandemic** , accounting for more than 20% of _all cases nationwide_.
**Gov. DeSantis ' tenure has been an _unmitigated disaster_ for Florida.** We can't afford to let him win a second term -- and we CERTAINLY can't let him get anywhere near the White House.

**[We only get one chance to stop him, so let's make sure we don't blow it. Donate now to defeat DeSantis and help us elect a governor who will build a Florida for All.](https://act.myngp.com/el/AjLTS7DDJGIpxWW2YmNPpA==/5U9tQ7RBRTQcdQOhlkVDJA==?refcode=20210802_f_1_fl&amount=25)**

name: Urgent Alert via McAuliffe HQ
subject: We’re running out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
this will spell disaster
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33419743/298822888/-2023814932?refcode=20210802.3_MHQ_8E&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmFhNDdmZi1kY2YzLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U18qKwtYFfOru42IjscAA_IYvF948sDo48zN53LDfl4=)

| | Derek, we’ve got some bad news.

_**We might have to pull our ads from the air.**_

Glenn Youngkin has been outspending us on TV for a while now, so when we launched our first ad two weeks ago, we wanted to make a splash.

| Yesterday, like millions of Americans, I went to church. Unfortunately, this sparked dozens of liberals to attack my faith and my family over the internet.
---
| [](http://link.email.dynect.net/link.php?DynEngagement=true&H=ltqmAiFyUus3V9RIZo7G2GvP5ZEKnzR2GJf36yV3Tq9umbKmiMNzDwYykL0C75qyK1f0Ahvm1jxr4cC9E8LvpZe3K%2BVtBfJzHfej92FmcUMfPK6fd0At1Uku7dAqdkBq&G=0&R=https%3A%2F%2FSTUTG4ZTGNA.hatchbuck.com%2FTrackLinkClick%3FID2%3DKGFRnjP-pukrsPDsPD5PqTChZeEdgXTfcyEMMi0hjYQp2_uDpUv3FzU1RJRvYP5d0&I=20210802182458.000000058771%40mail6-61-ussnn1&X=MHwxMjcwODUwOjE5OTQ4MDk5Mjg7MXwxMjcwODUxOjE2ODQ1NjIyNjs%3D&V=3&S=y9DbSm5hl4mqpKIDAjzlgrw6U_3rzcIOLDNP_hI5fbU)

| I doubt there is much we can do to change the hearts and minds of those who choose to spend their time attacking others for their faith. But to me and countless others, our faith is our strength. All I can do is pray for those who would choose to make those attacks, and pray that our country does not continue down this path.
God Bless, Randy Feenstra

clean_body: | | | | | , | Yesterday, like millions of Americans, I went to church. Unfortunately, this sparked dozens of liberals to attack my faith and my family over the internet. | | I doubt there is much we can do to change the hearts and minds of those who choose to spend their time attacking others for their faith. But to me and countless others, our faith is our strength. All I can do is pray for those who would choose to make those attacks, and pray that our country does not continue down this path. God Bless, Randy Feenstra | | Paid for by Feenstra for Congress Not interested in email updates from Feenstra For Congress? body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33420939/298826357/2005830277?refcode=20210802_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzRkNTc0Yi1lMmYzLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=my15FWBIWbIM1_pS3rjyhzGY0OFsfE1MfS5V-3mQoyk=) Friend, Next year, the work we’re all doing right now to preserve our Democratic majorities will pay off in a big way. In other words, the work we put in right now will determine the future of our country. That’s why we’re so grateful for your support in July. Despite the all-too-common summer slump, you helped us hit our end-of-month fundraising goal. We had incredible success last November and again in January with Georgia’s Senate races -- but we can’t take anything for granted heading into 2022. The midterms have historically been won by the party that didn’t win the White House. That means the stakes are high and winning will be an uphill battle. But we can do it if we keep working together. Thanks, Team Moulton In other words, the work we put in right now will determine the future of our country. That’s why we’re so grateful for your support in July. Despite the all-too-common summer slump, you helped us hit our end-of-month fundraising goal. We had incredible success last November and again in January with Georgia’s Senate races -- but we can’t take anything for granted heading into 2022. The midterms have historically been won by the party that didn’t win the White House. That means the stakes are high and winning will be an uphill battle. subject: FIRST recall, THEN save CA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LARRY ELDER BALLOT MEASURE COMMITTEE RECALL NEWSOM
body:
We can't begin to save California without FIRST voting YES to recall Newsom. | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58060022:6SNvmxlN7:m:1:3253819041:1C0C0AAA9AF15E39D9F88BA122F438FD:r)

---
Peter,

To say Gavin Newsom has failed California is a HUGE understatement.

Gavin Newsom has...
Destroyed...
Betrayed...
Ruined...
Endangered...
Repressed...
Impoverished California.

This is why we're fighting to recall Gavin Newsom, [**and we need your help.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58060022:6SNvmxlN7:m:1:3253819041:1C0C0AAA9AF15E39D9F88BA122F438FD:r)

We can't begin to save California and restore it to the place where people once again come to achieve the American Dream without **FIRST voting YES to recall Newsom.**

[**Will you join us and help recall Gavin Newsom on September 14th by chipping in $25, $50, $100 or even more today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58060022:6SNvmxlN7:m:1:3253819041:1C0C0AAA9AF15E39D9F88BA122F438FD:r)

[**JOIN LARRY ELDER
RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58060022:6SNvmxlN7:m:1:3253819041:1C0C0AAA9AF15E39D9F88BA122F438FD:r)
Under Gavin Newsom, people and businesses are fleeing California in droves. Those who choose to stay face rampant crime & homelessness, a broken education system, high cost of living and high taxes.

_What has happened to California is both heartbreaking and infuriating_

**It 's not too late to save our state, but first we need to get rid of the man responsible for its demise.**

Recalling Gavin Newsom is question #1 on the September 14th recall election ballot, and it's the first step to getting California back on the path to prosperity, opportunity and exceptionalism.

[**Will you contribute $25, $50, $100 or even more now to help us rally Californians who are ready to save California and recall failed governor Gavin Newsom?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58060022:6SNvmxlN7:m:1:3253819041:1C0C0AAA9AF15E39D9F88BA122F438FD:r)

Thank you,

Larry Elder
Recall Newsom
Ballot Committee

[**JOIN LARRY ELDER
RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58060022:6SNvmxlN7:m:1:3253819041:1C0C0AAA9AF15E39D9F88BA122F438FD:r)
| "Gavin Newsom has failed California. He's raised our taxes, closed our schools, put millions out of work, killed any number of small businesses, released thousands of criminals into our communities, and allowed the homeless to take over our streets. It's time to hold Gavin Newsom accountable for the nightmare he's made of California. Join me in voting YES to recall Gavin Newsom on September 14th." - LARRY ELDER

name: Team Lopez
subject: urgent response needed (re: GOP extremists in Arizona)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
| | | Friend: **Arizona is ground zero for GOP extremism – and if we don't fight back now, our democracy could be in serious danger. **
---
Right now, Republican extremists in Arizona are pushing 23 voter suppression bills to promote Trump's "Big Lie" and silence the voters that powered Democrats to victory in 2020. Even worse? They've hired a QAnon-supporting conspiracy theorist group to conduct a sham "election audit" – all to challenge President Biden's victory and bring Trumpism roaring back to life in our state.
**With all eyes on Arizona – and extremists from Marjorie Taylor Greene to Donald Trump zeroing in on our state to use as a blueprint across the nation – we need grassroots Democrats like you to urgently speak out against their far-right conspiracies and defend our democracy.

But with time running out before our midnight deadline, we're still falling 14 responses short in 18326. So please, friend, tell us immediately:**
| | **Friend, respond to our LIVE poll before it closes at 11:59 p.m.:**
---

name: Laura Loomer
subject: It’s called Financial Terrorism.
body:
I've gotten a lot of responses over the last few years saying . . .
| | | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ABLLveSdr5rcQVAYM7MSeg/LyLL892D763ZH9pNpHZGYE4Z4Q) | Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ABLLveSdr5rcQVAYM7MSeg/LyLL892D763ZH9pNpHZGYE4Z4Q) I've gotten a lot of responses over the last few years from supporters saying, "I'd like to donate, but will only use PayPal."

I don't use PayPal - actually I CAN'T use PayPal. They banned me a few years ago just like Facebook and Twitter.

**And now they 're taking it even further.**

Last week, PayPal announced they will be working with leftist groups to "study extremist activity" on its platform.

Just like a group that worked with CAIR and was funded by George Soros studied all of my associations and convinced Twitter to ban people who criticized Ilhan Omar, PayPal will be doing the same . . . **but to the larger conservative movement**.

Social media bias is one thing - and bad enough.

But stripping people's ability to conduct financial transactions based off of their political affiliations is incredibly damaging, **and I 'd go so far to call it FINANCIAL TERRORISM**.

[**Help me fight back by donating today to support my legal work.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ABLLveSdr5rcQVAYM7MSeg/LyLL892D763ZH9pNpHZGYE4Z4Q)

I know small business owners who use PayPal exclusively for their transactions. Others get business loans from PayPal and countless others make use of the platform weekly, if not daily.

I even have friends who use the PayPal credit card.

And they are TERRIFIED they'll lose that financial resource - and from what we've seen, once PayPal bans you, other financial institutions follow their lead . . . **like my bank did**.

**In fact, once you 're banned from PayPal, you lose the ability to work with businesses and online platforms who exclusively use PayPal for their payment processing.**

I can't tell you how many vendors I've dealt with who are afraid to make their association with me and other conservatives public. And I don't blame them. They have employees and families to feed.

When I was banned from PayPal, I was even demonetized on my own website because the ad network ran through PayPal.

**PayPal and Big Tech 's move isn't about fighting extremism, it's about quelling dissent and controlling public speech.**

[**Help me fight back by supporting my work.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ABLLveSdr5rcQVAYM7MSeg/LyLL892D763ZH9pNpHZGYE4Z4Q)

Very soon, I'll be filing a groundbreaking lawsuit that will target Big Tech for who they really are: **the Big Tech Mafia**.

Preparation for this lawsuit has already cost me a fortune, and once we get it filed, the bills are going to stack up, but it will be worth it.

I just need [**your continued support**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ABLLveSdr5rcQVAYM7MSeg/LyLL892D763ZH9pNpHZGYE4Z4Q) to keep going and to finally put an end to the real domestic terrorism that we're facing at the hands of the Big Tech tyrants.

I'm doing this for all of us, so [**please join me and support my work today**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ABLLveSdr5rcQVAYM7MSeg/LyLL892D763ZH9pNpHZGYE4Z4Q).

What has happened to me, can and will happen to you if this isn't stopped.

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: Karen Bass
subject: Here's why the fight continues:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Hello,

I want to say thank you to each of you who signed a petition, submitted a survey, or donated to my campaign last month. We pushed hard and were able to meet the goals we set for this campaign. Every action you take is moving our fight for social and economic justice forward.

We have to keep fighting because the work in Congress is far from over.

On Saturday the CDC's eviction moratorium expired, impacting nearly two million Americans who are now facing housing insecurity in the middle of an ongoing pandemic. In the richest country in the world, millions of people shouldn't be on the brink of homelessness. **No one should.** This is a moral crisis, and it is not taken lightly.

I'm urging action and will continue to do so. My priority in Congress is passing legislation to ensure that folks like you have affordable housing, accessible health care, economic opportunity, and an equitable justice system. I will not rest until that's a reality for all Americans -- most especially the Black and brown communities who have been kept from that equality and justice for so long.

Thank you for staying in this fight with me. The work continues.

Karen

Karen Bass started as a community organizer, so she knows just how much a $5 or $10 donation can do. Help fuel her movement to make social and economic justice for all a reality by chipping in today.
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/NoD5gl-cI0vdWK61vaYf30crkrcqkHEqde-bKWNb7n4=/o94yfutW5eAHT0638phfTRovGLWlPNq1xdYCNgIc0cc=?gpsid=31_132_20024&refcode=em21_210802_eomty_fnd_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210802_eomty_fnd_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)

name: Mark Takano
subject: The events of January 6th.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
What we saw and heard was heartbreaking and disturbing.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33423134/298832042/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTRhMTBhYi1lYmYzLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6M17LNIvq4hCfXBIagw55w7m-Tw4qCbQGciWlve5fC0=)
---
**Peter, the events of January 6th continue to haunt us.**

But that’s especially true for the Capitol Police who put their lives on the line that day to defend the U.S. Capitol and the lawmakers inside (including myself).

In the days following, multiple Capitol Police members died, **while the MAGA Republicans on the other side of the aisle _pretended nothing even happened._**

Just last week however, we heard harrowing testimony from some of the Capitol Police who were serving on January 6th -- reaffirming the events of that day. And what we heard was heartbreaking and disturbing: _“For most people, Jan. 6 happened for a few hours. But for those of us who were in the thick of it, it has not ended.”_
_\--_
_“I was grabbed, beaten, tased, all while being called a traitor to my country. I was at risk of being stripped of and killed with my own firearm.”_
_\--_
_“Some people are trying to deny what happened. To whitewash it... Let's be clear. The rioters who tried to rob us of our democracy were propelled here by a lie.”_ **Despite all this, MAGA Republicans are STILL trying to undermine, downplay, and LIE about January 6th. They’re trying to obstruct justice and stop the good work of the Jan. 6th select committee.**

[**Peter, the committee’s work is far too important to be undermined by far-right Republicans. That’s why I need 10,000 grassroots supporters to support the January 6th committee and tell Republicans in Congress to stop the lies and do their jobs to protect our democracy NOW. Can I count on you? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33423135/298832043/960040669?refcode=MTFC_20210802_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTRhMTBhYi1lYmYzLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6M17LNIvq4hCfXBIagw55w7m-Tw4qCbQGciWlve5fC0=&emci=19d50aff-cff3-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7a4a10ab-ebf3-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18839602) | [10,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33423136/298832045/960040669?refcode=MTFC_20210802_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTRhMTBhYi1lYmYzLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6M17LNIvq4hCfXBIagw55w7m-Tw4qCbQGciWlve5fC0=&emci=19d50aff-cff3-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7a4a10ab-ebf3-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18839602)

Thank you,

Mark Takano
| | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517
www.marktakano.com

Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. clean_body: What we saw and heard was heartbreaking and disturbing. | = Peter, the events of January 6th continue to haunt us. But that’s especially true for the Capitol Police who put their lives on the line that day to defend the U.S. Capitol and the lawmakers inside (including myself). In the days following, multiple Capitol Police members died, while the MAGA Republicans on the other side of the aisle pretended nothing even happened. Just last week however, we heard harrowing testimony from some of the Capitol Police who were serving on January 6th -- reaffirming the events of that day. And what we heard was heartbreaking and disturbing: “For most people, Jan. 6 happened for a few hours. But for those of us who were in the thick of it, it has not ended.” \-- “I was grabbed, beaten, tased, all while being called a traitor to my country. I was at risk of being stripped of and killed with my own firearm.” \-- “Some people are trying to deny what happened. To whitewash it... Let's be clear. The rioters who tried to rob us of our democracy were propelled here by a lie.” Despite all this, MAGA Republicans are STILL trying to undermine, downplay, and LIE about January 6th. They’re trying to obstruct justice and stop the good work of the Jan. 6th select committee. | Thank you, Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: I have some important news to share with you
body:
| |
---
We recently became aware that a malicious third party hacked into our systems for political reasons, and compromised some of our user data. We have notified law enforcement authorities, and have been working with them since becoming aware of the breach. We have worked to ensure that our systems are not compromised and are secured even further to ensure that an event of this type does not happen again.

The information that we believe the hacker gained access to includes some of our supporters’ names and personal contact information, and a limited amount of donation history (dollar amounts of donations, and the dates on which those donations were made). **At this point, because we do not retain credit card and banking information, we have no reason to believe that anyone’s credit card information, banking information, or information from financial institutions was compromised.**

On behalf of our entire team, I apologize. We take very seriously the trust you have placed in us, and we take very seriously our responsibility to safeguard your user information. That’s why we’re working as diligently as we are, as fast as we can, to address the situation and to do everything we can to prevent something like this from happening again.

For over a decade, our organization has been the target of political attacks because of our success, including persecution by the IRS under the Obama Administration and now this concerted attack because of our actions over the past year during these government mandates and lockdowns, where we have stood up to government officials that we believe should be held accountable for decisions based neither on law nor science. This isn’t the first time our political opponents have tried to intimidate us, and it will not be the last. They will not succeed. We will continue to stand firm for our shared values of personal freedom, economic freedom, and a debt-free future.

And you can be certain that we will take every step possible to find and help prosecute these criminals who have broken into our electronic home and stolen proprietary and confidential information.

We will never stop fighting for our principles and we appreciate your continued dedication to the rule of law and our shared values.
In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin
Honorary Chairman
Tea Party Patriots Action
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjE0LTE0MDAyNjBmZmIyMjQ4MTRhOTkwZDk5NjJkNjM5M2Rj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvP21pZD00NDEzMCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=4H78lxlUfDYMnn72_iCkug)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Our Audit is under attack!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Help me fight back! |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=409147c36f&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
I am writing you today with an urgent request. I need you to help me fight the DOJ.

**My name is Mark Finchem. I am the America First Candidate who President Trump calls “a real leader in Arizona” running for Secretary of State in Arizona.**

_I am the first guy to take a stand and say NO. I listened to you when no one else could be bothered. I have led a team of proud America-First Patriots who are standing up valiantly to election fraud in Arizona._

**And the DOJ is threatening us in no uncertain terms, and I need your help TODAY.**

[_Donate GENEROUSLY today to help us stand up to the Department of Justice who is threatening America’s audit!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=41e112a613&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=bc873e5613&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| ***Fight the DOJ***
**I need your help because the Audit is under attack and the only way to ensure that the Democrats CANT steal our elections is for me to make a strong statement in my campaign for Secretary of State!**

The Washington Post is propagandizing on behalf of the Department of Justice:

_“There have been reports, with respect to some of the post-2020 ballot examinations, of proposals to contact individuals face to face to see whether the individuals were qualified voters who had actually voted,” the department stated, referencing Cyber Ninjas, the outfit that has proposed canvassing Arizona voters in search of voter fraud. “This sort of activity raises concerns regarding potential intimidation of voters. . . . Jurisdictions that authorize or conduct audits must ensure that the way those reviews are conducted has neither the purpose nor the effect of dissuading qualified citizens from participating in the electoral process. If they do not, the Department will act to ensure that all eligible citizens feel safe in exercising their right to register and cast a ballot in future elections.”_

_The directive is not a lawsuit, but it provides a clear predicate should Arizona or other jurisdictions flout voting laws. Given the uphill climb for new voting-rights legislation, aggressive enforcement of existing laws is critical. Attorney General Merrick Garland seems willing to combat fake audits, something not covered by legislation under consideration in Congress._

_When coupled with other developments at the Justice Department regarding matters related to Jan. 6, it seems Garland is attempting to dispel the impression that he intends to be a passive observer of an assault on voting rights. He does not have a lot of arrows in his quiver thanks to the filibuster and the Supreme Court’s cramped view of voting rights, but he sounds ready to make the most of what he has. That’s a development all Americans should cheer._

**“That’s a development all Americans should cheer.”**

This is what we are up against. Attorney General Merrick Garland is doing everything in his power to stop me in my quest to prove the fraud in the 2020 election.

_And we are already making great strides with the Arizona Audit._

**When we have found more than enough problematic votes to potentially overturn the Arizona election results, and Joe Biden’s lapdog starts barking, think we’re going to back down?**

**_Heck no._**

In fact, I’ve been going on the offensive.
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=79e0b55ef7&e=44b8c466b0)
---

I am the America First Candidate who President Trump calls “a real leader in Arizona” running for Secretary of State in Arizona. I am the first guy to take a stand and say NO. I listened to you when no one else could be bothered. I have led a team of proud America-First Patriots who are standing up valiantly to election fraud in Arizona. And the DOJ is threatening us in no uncertain terms, and I need your help TODAY. | | | *Fight the DOJ I need your help because the Audit is under attack and the only way to ensure that the Democrats CANT steal our elections is for me to make a strong statement in my campaign for Secretary of State! The Washington Post is propagandizing on behalf of the Department of Justice: “There have been reports, with respect to some of the post-2020 ballot examinations, of proposals to contact individuals face to face to see whether the individuals were qualified voters who had actually voted,” the department stated, referencing Cyber Ninjas, the outfit that has proposed canvassing Arizona voters in search of voter fraud. “This sort of activity raises concerns regarding potential intimidation of voters. . . . Jurisdictions that authorize or conduct audits must ensure that the way those reviews are conducted has neither the purpose nor the effect of dissuading qualified citizens from participating in the electoral process. If they do not, the Department will act to ensure that all eligible citizens feel safe in exercising their right to register and cast a ballot in future elections.” The directive is not a lawsuit, but it provides a clear predicate should Arizona or other jurisdictions flout voting laws. Given the uphill climb for new voting-rights legislation, aggressive enforcement of existing laws is critical. Attorney General Merrick Garland seems willing to combat fake audits, something not covered by legislation under consideration in Congress. When coupled with other developments at the Justice Department regarding matters related to Jan. 6, it seems Garland is attempting to dispel the impression that he intends to be a passive observer of an assault on voting rights. He does not have a lot of arrows in his quiver thanks to the filibuster and the Supreme Court’s cramped view of voting rights, but he sounds ready to make the most of what he has. That’s a development all Americans should cheer. “That’s a development all Americans should cheer.” This is what we are up against. Attorney General Merrick Garland is doing everything in his power to stop me in my quest to prove the fraud in the 2020 election. And we are already making great strides with the Arizona Audit. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced that it received 2,469 pages of new documents from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), which reveal that Facebook coordinated closely with the CDC to control the COVID narrative and “misinformation” and that over $3.5 million in free advertising given to the CDC by social media companies. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Aug 2, 2021 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | == | == Judicial Watch announced that it received 2,469 pages of new documents from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), which reveal that Facebook coordinated closely with the CDC to control the COVID narrative and “misinformation” and that over $3.5 million in free advertising given to the CDC by social media companies. == ---|--- | | | | == | == “The American people have every right to know key information on our government’s role in COVID,” said Neil Patel, Daily Caller News Foundation publisher. “This sort of hiding, dodging and stonewalling is one reason why trust in national authorities is near all-time lows.” “Fauci’s agency is in stonewall mode – and has granted the corrupted WHO a special secrecy exemption from FOIA,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. == ---|--- | | | | = | = Judicial Watch announced it filed an amended complaint in its lawsuit on behalf of the Daily Caller News Foundation and reporter Thomas Catenacci against Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot for violating their First Amendment rights and Catenacci’s right to equal protection under the Fourteenth Amendment. = ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced that it obtained 280 pages of documents from the Department of Health and Human Services revealing that from 2014 to 2019, $826,277 was given to the Wuhan Institute of Virology for bat coronavirus research by the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID), which is headed by Dr. Anthony Fauci. ---|--- | | | = The Washington Times There’s more – and less – than meets the eye regarding the recent Department of Justice lawsuit filed against Georgia’s new election integrity law. The complaint alleges that several provisions of SB 202 were passed with a discriminatory purpose in violation of Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act. = = The New York Post The Defense Department doled out millions of dollars to the same nonprofit that funneled federal grant money to the Wuhan Institute of Virology for bat coronavirus research — with most of the Pentagon money going toward murky research on countering biological weapons. = == Fox News Jeanne Hedgepeth, of Palatine, 35 miles northwest of Willis Tower, made the posts on her personal Facebook account while on summer break following the end of the school year, the conservative legal group said in a statement. She did not exchange posts with any current students or colleagues, and the profile made no mention of her employer. == = = = = = = | CLIPS == == | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved == |

name: John Fetterman
subject: from Sheetz Land to Wawa Country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Thanks to this grassroots team, we were able to surpass our $102,769 fundraising goal for the end of July.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210802-2190-header&t=1&akid=2190%2E434096%2EHGDpO2)
Peter, Gisele and I want to take a quick moment today to say **thank you.** 😭
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25930?refcode=em20210802-2190&t=2&akid=2190%2E434096%2EHGDpO2)
Thank you for believing in our campaign, and thank you for trusting in me to flip this Senate seat blue so we can deliver for working people across our country.
**Thanks to this grassroots team, we were able to surpass our $102,769 fundraising goal for the end of July.** Every contribution made in July has made it possible for our campaign to continue full speed ahead towards opening up our first round of field offices, spreading our message to voters, and planning events across our Commonwealth.
Together, we are building a true, people-powered movement for all 67 Pennsylvania counties.
We're gonna fight everywhere, from the geographical edge of Sheetz Land, to the cradle of Wawa Country.
Yinz to Youse. Pop to Soda.
There's just no other way to win Pennsylvania: **Every County. Every Vote.**
[**_If you're with us and willing to make sure we kick off August in the strongest way possible, please consider chipping in your first contribution today. Thank you._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25930?refcode=em20210802-2190&t=3&akid=2190%2E434096%2EHGDpO2)
**[Donate »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25930?refcode=em20210802-2190&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2190%2E434096%2EHGDpO2)**
I'm just so deeply grateful for all of it, Peter. You're the best.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. If you didn't get a chance to chip in before July's deadline, it's not too late — all signs are pointing to the fact that ours will be the most competitive and expensive race in the country in 2022. [** _With that in mind, will you be among the first folks from your city to donate in August so we can keep our foot on the gas? Thank you so much in advance._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25930?refcode=em20210802-2190&t=5&akid=2190%2E434096%2EHGDpO2) 🙏

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210802-2190-footer&t=6&refcode2=2190_434096_HGDpO2&akid=2190%2E434096%2EHGDpO2)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

name: Tyler Kistner
subject: my why
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS
body:
When our country needed real leadership, we were failed. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b8e55fdeb55c437284a92a2a85f09166&_e=jXcz9x4QCXrhk8Fu1dGLefoCYQJOmvhC9ONi5XCo0XVXvbqJigqwidJ882niYoS9D0vDeivRy0A1HF7LnYYzYnKu02XiLMPfFjvgGLzuXSmdE-aaY-oOsd4eRBE_wSnHbG3QfpviX_KZGHuyoMgD1LYG4gQ2wWQDXygbireqMiZNsSfZCXy2M7732FMQo-Sa6C6Vj7m16byEG_1YWahhBHL8EVuZ3Gwdlwbbuuh4FWEPZaRSZPPU1ec9qzpN-_RPj_zFvJy0yNWRXwNYXKP9yD0RJLmC3zCfGhCZgGS90lWC2J3-gM0m6ciEX5AYJ5yOc84toqAy0rI7_-N6uxo9ODOHP6CU4HFwgTJUktObwX4HBYq6DwTyQG3Y0EF4JaqMOGinVaX8C8fZl82Oyb_P3g%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

When I think back on the past tumultuous year, I remember how:

Our city burned.

Our families were scared, even in their own homes.

Violent crime surged across our communities.

**_When our country needed real leadership, we were failed._**

So, when my second child was born and I looked into his big curious eyes, I knew I had to run for Congress because our families deserve so much better than a state ran by radical liberals who want to defund our police, open our borders, and destroy the foundation our country was built on.

If we haven’t met yet, I’m Tyler Kistner. A proud father of two, husband, and Marine Raider Veteran. I would do anything for my children, my family, and my country.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b8e55fdeb55c437284a92a2a85f09166&_e=jXcz9x4QCXrhk8Fu1dGLefoCYQJOmvhC9ONi5XCo0XVXvbqJigqwidJ882niYoS9D0vDeivRy0A1HF7LnYYzYnKu02XiLMPfFjvgGLzuXSmdE-aaY-oOsd4eRBE_wSnHbG3QfpviX_KZGHuyoMgD1LYG4gQ2wWQDXygbireqMiZNsSfZCXy2M7732FMQo-Sa_ZoXxcTyvyrAz22i-Gs1HKYN-fNIQtVIXCr2D0CvyCEu3rmACIi9YpOqaqQjCOoeJTUt-TnvQ-rHugwiCWYH7M-tR7tx-Sswnof2d-0E5cykYXrG0_ncFRhgsdFELdor5UMYuAHqX-Vtin4D3b2ef3QeJkBjO92NWVXxPDmkJdy4MP2RnO0GgsyEdaMYK0-UtSucR7EyLzBP63uk_TVkWQ%3D%3D)

But right now, our nation is experiencing the early stages of tyranny. We are facing an oppressive government who wants to strip us of our rights, ruin our economy, and rob our children of their future - _their birthrights as Americans._

[** ****Send in the Marine ➞ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b8e55fdeb55c437284a92a2a85f09166&_e=jXcz9x4QCXrhk8Fu1dGLefoCYQJOmvhC9ONi5XCo0XVXvbqJigqwidJ882niYoS9D0vDeivRy0A1HF7LnYYzYnKu02XiLMPfFjvgGLzuXSmdE-aaY-oOsd4eRBE_wSnHbG3QfpviX_KZGHuyoMgD1LYG4gQ2wWQDXygbireqMiZNsSfZCXy2M7732FMQo-SaX7CArtcBYFmIZtcSMe3pQtCx6pPNpJuPsP8BN6Ap1ojiAIFeKlsfkAuYvkWvZhVE62NLv481k4awl90E5rxXaVx1-FwzcB6Z68wPauC1rhIl6DuFgKjiAU65CYBLkJ6UhBFo94C1-V4-kR7hCyHc074Vn5ImkyB6rbGD7UdIqG8kwRWZ9WzstJR7P_ZwJOsMy8jDW9rEk5VPHZRzyXvgqQ%3D%3D)

My children deserve a shot at the America dream, and so do yours. _But the path we are on right now, is horrifying._

I served nine years in the U.S. Marine Corps, for five of those years I served in the elite Marine Special Operation Forces - the Marine Raiders. I took an oath to defend our Constitution, and my oath to this country will never expire. [**I want to fix the broken system in Washington, so we have a country we are proud to leave for our next generation and that’s what I plan to do in Congress.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b8e55fdeb55c437284a92a2a85f09166&_e=jXcz9x4QCXrhk8Fu1dGLefoCYQJOmvhC9ONi5XCo0XVXvbqJigqwidJ882niYoS9D0vDeivRy0A1HF7LnYYzYnKu02XiLMPfFjvgGLzuXSmdE-aaY-oOsd4eRBE_wSnHbG3QfpviX_KZGHuyoMgD1LYG4gQ2wWQDXygbireqMiZNsSfZCXy2M7732FMQo-Saf3q5CXWaBIcBeAYBgXAOomnrw9KTB5Mhi1iHQnUAnNzVccTX3F4NA2wdecnsSqEIixaeS4NA1tbirr-nuFlOkAiHMVC0zeFrwXXDEphUPzzuOlA55tPLVHuVEZsHR1I6g7FF_8iZDXmN-qNdOtAXzZmCf2EffnWabKxBfda2o3ZFt7lk6wHXff1naxoIPyHRaYg1CGU8cAVEXl_9BHdusA%3D%3D)

When I ran last year, we had one of the closest races in the country. I fell short by less than 10,000 votes. But this year, all eyes are on this seat. It’s one of the top races in the country because Republicans only need to net FIVE seats to regain our majority and take the country back from the intolerant and radical Left.

I’m running for Congress in Minnesota’s 2nd district because the current 'leaders' have sold out our children’s future to the radicals who wish to destroy the American dream. [**I will not sit idly by as radical tyrants wreck our country. Together, we can restore and preserve the country we love. Will you join me?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b8e55fdeb55c437284a92a2a85f09166&_e=jXcz9x4QCXrhk8Fu1dGLefoCYQJOmvhC9ONi5XCo0XVXvbqJigqwidJ882niYoS9D0vDeivRy0A1HF7LnYYzYnKu02XiLMPfFjvgGLzuXSmdE-aaY-oOsd4eRBE_wSnHbG3QfpviX_KZGHuyoMgD1LYG4gQ2wWQDXygbireqMiZNsSfZCXy2M7732FMQo-SaSimBEzdcDQUst8k5ALMzfBm780b-i5W8DXTM5HwilXOVL82Il75fTD_austF6E3FtvL_rzYXIXaOzF7dOLbzbXGtj4PCCaCZIgtyALIbJ_mNfFG5SV2Vr36oZ4A--k5RzIkz_oPz3E7qo1NkVNofzcORVizsmrujSjdLKYAEp6ONNegbf71OnUCknkYk8FbVbXCBmsp_GtavAb6tSWvhLQ%3D%3D)

Let’s take our country back.

In Service,
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b8e55fdeb55c437284a92a2a85f09166&_e=jXcz9x4QCXrhk8Fu1dGLefoCYQJOmvhC9ONi5XCo0XVXvbqJigqwidJ882niYoS9D0vDeivRy0A1HF7LnYYzYnKu02XiLMPfFjvgGLzuXSmdE-aaY-oOsd4eRBE_wSnHbG3QfpviX_KZGHuyoMgD1LYG4gQ2wWQDXygbireqMiZNsSfZCXy2M7732FMQo-SaGM7Xget-r3wbJF8R7Myxq5I9ZODfBGDioB6k4C5FKXhdpH3wcmnIRYaKvApZ2EbXIlw77dsCgGz3wh4pVrjHAYcO-VlOWvIGSpeZFaZDfKR2u3Bnh6Rbvh3vjplr9JhvZN6bNAMDFoMmsJm3MgLLuuMLP9Ry7jK95AiMebxhsS2RRsmkEYn-4SVoKYNyR0o-UJ5NAUIRdbjps46XWvPl3Q%3D%3D)
Tyler Kistner
Father. Husband. Marine Veteran.

clean_body: When our country needed real leadership, we were failed. | Peter, When I think back on the past tumultuous year, I remember how: Our city burned. Our families were scared, even in their own homes. Violent crime surged across our communities. When our country needed real leadership, we were failed. So, when my second child was born and I looked into his big curious eyes, I knew I had to run for Congress because our families deserve so much better than a state ran by radical liberals who want to defund our police, open our borders, and destroy the foundation our country was built on. If we haven’t met yet, I’m Tyler Kistner. A proud father of two, husband, and Marine Raider Veteran. I would do anything for my children, my family, and my country. But right now, our nation is experiencing the early stages of tyranny. We are facing an oppressive government who wants to strip us of our rights, ruin our economy, and rob our children of their future - their birthrights as Americans. My children deserve a shot at the America dream, and so do yours. But the path we are on right now, is horrifying. I served nine years in the U.S. Marine Corps, for five of those years I served in the elite Marine Special Operation Forces - the Marine Raiders. I took an oath to defend our Constitution, and my oath to this country will never expire. When I ran last year, we had one of the closest races in the country. I fell short by less than 10,000 votes. But this year, all eyes are on this seat. It’s one of the top races in the country because Republicans only need to net FIVE seats to regain our majority and take the country back from the intolerant and radical Left. I’m running for Congress in Minnesota’s 2nd district because the current 'leaders' have sold out our children’s future to the radicals who wish to destroy the American dream. Let’s take our country back. In Service, Tyler Kistner Father. Husband. Marine Veteran. | | PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

clean_body: this is important | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | A lot has happened over the past several months so I wanted to reach out to a few well-informed people in Pennsylvania for a new Digital Interview. President Biden, Vice President Harris, and the entire administration have made such tremendous progress on important issues like the COVID-19 pandemic. I was looking through my records, and you stuck out as someone I can count on to give me an honest assessment of how things are going for you in Pennsylvania. I need your help to create an air-tight strategy to protect my swing district, secure our Democratic Majority, and help President Biden and Vice President Harris pass their agenda. Thanks for your help! \-- Dr. Raul Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. We set one of these limited-edition mugs aside exclusively for you - but we can only hold it for the next 30 minutes.

_We need your help._
**
The Left is trying to cancel Chick-Fil-A because the company is run by Conservatives! **

It's ridiculous. They've cancelled Dr. Seuss, the flag, even the Fourth of July! And now they're canceling a private company simply because they disagree with their beliefs? Where will they draw the line?

Unless we put a stop to cancel culture and the Left's woke agenda, they'll never let up until they've entirely silenced conservative voices. Unless we put a stop to cancel culture and the Left's woke agenda, they'll never let up until they've entirely silenced conservative voices. We've had enough of the Radical Left trying to cancel Conservative voices, and we know you have too - that 's why we thought you'd want to claim this exclusive Uncancel America mug. We even set one of these limited-edition mugs aside exclusively for you - but we can only hold it for the next 30 minutes. We're running out of inventory FAST. The last time we checked, we only had just over 1,000 left. If you do, they 'll be gone! subject: Attorney General Candidate Nathan Hochman Announces $800K Fundraising Haul
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nathan Hochman for Attorney General 2022
body:
Nathan Hochman reported a mid-year fundraising haul of over $800,000, solidifying his position as the Republican frontrunner to take on Rob Bonta. | | | [Peter, to v](https://mailchi.mp/49518171714f/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4413406?e=94837ebab3)[iew this email in ](https://mailchi.mp/49518171714f/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4413406?e=94837ebab3)[your](https://mailchi.mp/49518171714f/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4413406?e=94837ebab3)[ browser](https://mailchi.mp/49518171714f/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4413406?e=94837ebab3)[, click here.](https://mailchi.mp/49518171714f/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4413406?e=94837ebab3)
---
| |
---
| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
August 2, 2021
---
Contact:
press@nathanhochman.om
---
| **Attorney General Candidate Nathan Hochman Announces $800K Fundraising Haul ** _Hochman solidifies his position as the Republican frontrunner to take on Newsom appointee Rob Bonta in 2022_
---
| **Los Angeles, CA –** Former US Assistant Attorney General and candidate for California Attorney General, Nathan Hochman, has raised over $800,000 in his campaign to unseat Newsom appointee Rob Bonta in 2022.

_"I am so grateful for the tremendous support our campaign has received in the months since we launched this campaign." _remarked Nathan. _“While Rob Bonta continues to accept contributions from the same special interests who gave us failed DA’s like George Gascón and Chesa Boudin, our campaign is powered by the generosity of concerned Californians from across our state."_

In mid-year financial disclosures, Nathan will report $811,944.50 in total contributions with $680,004.05 cash on hand.

After graduating from Brown University and Stanford Law School, Nathan clerked for a US District Court Judge in Los Angeles before becoming an Assistant US Attorney for the Central District of California. In 2008, Nathan was appointed by President George W. Bush and confirmed by the US Senate as US Assistant Attorney General overseeing the Department of Justice’s Tax Division. After leaving DOJ, Nathan has had a successful career as a defense attorney and partner in two international law firms. Nathan served as a member and President of the Los Angeles City Ethics Commission from 2011 to 2016 and serves on numerous boards, including those governing the Cedar Sinai Medical Center and American Jewish University.

Nathan launched his campaign for Attorney General at the end of April. Since then, he has secured the endorsement of a growing number of prosecutors, elected officials, and community leaders. He has made [addressing fentanyl and the opioid epidemic ](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=bfc8779829&e=94837ebab3)a key issue of his campaign.

To stay up to date with the campaign, follow Nathan Hochman for Attorney General on [Facebook](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=a9ac457fe1&e=94837ebab3), [Twitter](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=73d906630d&e=94837ebab3), [Instagram](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=15a4fc92c8&e=94837ebab3) and [TikTok](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=4b1cfd323c&e=94837ebab3). ###
---

"I am so grateful for the tremendous support our campaign has received in the months since we launched this campaign." remarked Nathan. “While Rob Bonta continues to accept contributions from the same special interests who gave us failed DA’s like George Gascón and Chesa Boudin, our campaign is powered by the generosity of concerned Californians from across our state." In mid-year financial disclosures, Nathan will report $811,944.50 in total contributions with $680,004.05 cash on hand. After graduating from Brown University and Stanford Law School, Nathan clerked for a US District Court Judge in Los Angeles before becoming an Assistant US Attorney for the Central District of California. In 2008, Nathan was appointed by President George W. Bush and confirmed by the US Senate as US Assistant Attorney General overseeing the Department of Justice’s Tax Division. After leaving DOJ, Nathan has had a successful career as a defense attorney and partner in two international law firms. Nathan served as a member and President of the Los Angeles City Ethics Commission from 2011 to 2016 and serves on numerous boards, including those governing the Cedar Sinai Medical Center and American Jewish University. Nathan launched his campaign for Attorney General at the end of April. Since then, he has secured the endorsement of a growing number of prosecutors, elected officials, and community leaders. He has made key issue of his campaign. To stay up to date with the campaign, follow Nathan Hochman for Attorney General on , , and . ### | | Paid for by Nathan Hochman for Attorney General 2022 FPPC ID 1437955 Want to change how you receive these emails? Donald J. Trump August 2nd, 2021
45th President Donald J. Trump to Hold a Rally in Alabama
President Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America, will deliver remarks at a major rally in Cullman, Alabama, on Saturday, August 21, 2021, at 7:00PM CDT.

This rally will be hosted by the Alabama Republican Party and held in conjunction with the Alabama Republican Party’s Summer Meeting. This rally marks President Trump’s further support of the MAGA agenda and accomplishments of President Trump’s Administration.

**_Saturday, August 21, 2021, at 7:00PM CDT_**
_**President Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America, Delivers Remarks**_

** _Venue:_**
York Family Farms
1872 County Road 469
Cullman, AL 35057

** _Timeline of Events:_**
2:00PM – Doors open for a “45 Fest” with LIVE Music, Food and Beverage Concessions, and Special Guest Speakers

5:00PM – Pre-program Speakers Deliver Remarks

7:00PM – 45th President Donald J. Trump celebrates Freedom, Faith, and America

name: Tyler Kistner
subject: Send in the Marine
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS
body:
When our country needed real leadership, we were failed. | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8e0f11955f1e4af290191505e5b7a7c7&_e=iTht3JKngcT-zRgXlnPIA0yRM7tjZCk074Z5lomjQEd925xZiCmAZZm0RDQW7cbOzX_7RqeccoExs5PBJlBgbwpJdDPSVbaPfFuQmxaWiVm-Qg_MwFeKXU0b1N1ibBgo9Lrt61e_a_B-BcPmvLhpVOiyQe6k9Le8GDdVs9AJgQgXU-d-DyjSzCbL1OTKcsuq5wvINfqfsmxQF0ETYZtVJAqLk1LmJct5OAQPYhFjR_DlK__jLFrm8c9U-a697_tJWn85qgA9OBLqYXkUhgYukvqE7UXjVGBMFLKAAykyuYhm_2E5yEmytR9__kyHgyeGwTmDk-IgFjw9ZZyQ315MomasC0BPtxywPivIQ7nxj2RTnM_A7Hdz9oS80Kcd_z902HpGsjsG3PLHLHzsqmAPiA%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

When I think back on the past tumultuous year, I remember how:

Our city burned.

Our families were scared, even in their own homes.

Violent crime surged across our communities.

**_When our country needed real leadership, we were failed._**

So, when my second child was born and I looked into his big curious eyes, I knew I had to run for Congress because our families deserve so much better than a state ran by radical liberals who want to defund our police, open our borders, and destroy the foundation our country was built on.

If we haven’t met yet, I’m Tyler Kistner. A proud father of two, husband, and Marine Raider Veteran. I would do anything for my children, my family, and my country.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8e0f11955f1e4af290191505e5b7a7c7&_e=iTht3JKngcT-zRgXlnPIA0yRM7tjZCk074Z5lomjQEd925xZiCmAZZm0RDQW7cbOzX_7RqeccoExs5PBJlBgbwpJdDPSVbaPfFuQmxaWiVm-Qg_MwFeKXU0b1N1ibBgo9Lrt61e_a_B-BcPmvLhpVOiyQe6k9Le8GDdVs9AJgQgT6zqex0RSZtSto29IVirQxSdn_ntMH21dGbPbN7PdhxjVTi3xcgmSZ6Fy1jErKnL98lBfxvEiCgzCBj94ixiW5bj7y8MYqk5cOPxlb7EsdIFK7kXSYY_8QTxpy5oVgIok4CxWaRUVAneYslKfC--eyCuQDT0hSuMTBJoiozxB36Ie2WXvzyAntr-ZoP6aacLRay-jFQqR3tRCTPLu5K1pZBkzy2ldvvPuPy8LGk0aiw%3D%3D)

But right now, our nation is experiencing the early stages of tyranny. We are facing an oppressive government who wants to strip us of our rights, ruin our economy, and rob our children of their future - _their birthrights as Americans._

[** ****Send in the Marine ➞ **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8e0f11955f1e4af290191505e5b7a7c7&_e=iTht3JKngcT-zRgXlnPIA0yRM7tjZCk074Z5lomjQEd925xZiCmAZZm0RDQW7cbOzX_7RqeccoExs5PBJlBgbwpJdDPSVbaPfFuQmxaWiVm-Qg_MwFeKXU0b1N1ibBgo9Lrt61e_a_B-BcPmvLhpVOiyQe6k9Le8GDdVs9AJgQhnkCGByli3Re3OuUrj9YTUhUEVrx4RqifTQqiVgoPk6Jb0g4N32j3hbhR08TIXhlD1SvzNqVAOlBH6gBoT_PRV6cgQvTi20w5W6GoxuyDiVSGEYiSz023kX70TICpF8JTobNfEDbxzLAugzsdBmlfxJIZ_04QWwh-tIGigJxvYzNIs-eooomQ-cgQZzKkRgYvE4Z1ZJPRvbKgihN1fbApUZiSOnvJ14H1_Ffa4A3dbUA%3D%3D)

My children deserve a shot at the America dream, and so do yours. _But the path we are on right now, is horrifying._

I served nine years in the U.S. Marine Corps, for five of those years I served in the elite Marine Special Operation Forces - the Marine Raiders. I took an oath to defend our Constitution, and my oath to this country will never expire. [**I want to fix the broken system in Washington, so we have a country we are proud to leave for our next generation and that’s what I plan to do in Congress.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8e0f11955f1e4af290191505e5b7a7c7&_e=iTht3JKngcT-zRgXlnPIA0yRM7tjZCk074Z5lomjQEd925xZiCmAZZm0RDQW7cbOzX_7RqeccoExs5PBJlBgbwpJdDPSVbaPfFuQmxaWiVm-Qg_MwFeKXU0b1N1ibBgo9Lrt61e_a_B-BcPmvLhpVOiyQe6k9Le8GDdVs9AJgQjJsYPi9EZTjFdSgZruZCm1-bj5Jogxcx2Sfy8Sd_cKvgkXqUiGMQhYNMPPM4FcqS4-qb7xCbDzfSLUFxjK07bCAJLYr43WlrsapvtVIecIa5zv3IpZsnJ64hF4Cnzou0H45fLaWL51vGpHiP10usLKgsMjyR63BYhp2KeaCbT_K3sAWilsQ0m6-3DNcrxRg3T3I4oDd6p7_SlSzE8AYlHXx0tTLV7i-tzRXcVj4X-3Ug%3D%3D)

When I ran last year, we had one of the closest races in the country. I fell short by less than 10,000 votes. But this year, all eyes are on this seat. It’s one of the top races in the country because Republicans only need to net FIVE seats to regain our majority and take the country back from the intolerant and radical Left.

I’m running for Congress in Minnesota’s 2nd district because the current 'leaders' have sold out our children’s future to the radicals who wish to destroy the American dream. [**I will not sit idly by as radical tyrants wreck our country. Together, we can restore and preserve the country we love. Will you join me?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8e0f11955f1e4af290191505e5b7a7c7&_e=iTht3JKngcT-zRgXlnPIA0yRM7tjZCk074Z5lomjQEd925xZiCmAZZm0RDQW7cbOzX_7RqeccoExs5PBJlBgbwpJdDPSVbaPfFuQmxaWiVm-Qg_MwFeKXU0b1N1ibBgo9Lrt61e_a_B-BcPmvLhpVOiyQe6k9Le8GDdVs9AJgQier571vb-k3zMeB8jSPZ5aU9Jj_JPUP31BExfx0rXyT4PB6p-3rFQd3sc3gMdNhBmDVAk7rPv92FeGjyhExg5yrntjfnsBBBgjq871L-bfkMDRb-4kOyjmGebe5jxnAM0cF9NdTklqN5fLSLhtZnyYbt5c5aYzcxb-9cJyNAJzaMsD5o8-LSwYHtmE6IF8Cq6LTU33E1e7lIkYCA77WVISujGWk2IetHap6nWHZitU5A%3D%3D)

Let’s take our country back.

In Service,
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8e0f11955f1e4af290191505e5b7a7c7&_e=iTht3JKngcT-zRgXlnPIA0yRM7tjZCk074Z5lomjQEd925xZiCmAZZm0RDQW7cbOzX_7RqeccoExs5PBJlBgbwpJdDPSVbaPfFuQmxaWiVm-Qg_MwFeKXU0b1N1ibBgo9Lrt61e_a_B-BcPmvLhpVOiyQe6k9Le8GDdVs9AJgQiPVM1ZP0G8YRFY9jYQFP-4Dy2KVCtyQyd1BnsI5sLR_Co1AJ6ryJwZLC34FSCEt0HY1mpMAz4N6EHkw-1Bli92jKNO3vqt31-Pmlmex1chNyqAOTQIy-34tWAF5eSyJMxsa53gsdeFJOerNn5BByw_UmC831fFGlosq-jT-6Qbys49-MuZneIzhToqtue2EJVKvKk0GghoMTVneqJ_QO_H2SgVJ4Rp7m3BLpQw3Wu0jA%3D%3D)
Tyler Kistner
Father. Husband. Marine Veteran.

clean_body: When our country needed real leadership, we were failed. | Peter, When I think back on the past tumultuous year, I remember how: Our city burned. Our families were scared, even in their own homes. Violent crime surged across our communities. When our country needed real leadership, we were failed. So, when my second child was born and I looked into his big curious eyes, I knew I had to run for Congress because our families deserve so much better than a state ran by radical liberals who want to defund our police, open our borders, and destroy the foundation our country was built on. If we haven’t met yet, I’m Tyler Kistner. A proud father of two, husband, and Marine Raider Veteran. I would do anything for my children, my family, and my country. But right now, our nation is experiencing the early stages of tyranny. We are facing an oppressive government who wants to strip us of our rights, ruin our economy, and rob our children of their future - their birthrights as Americans. My children deserve a shot at the America dream, and so do yours. But the path we are on right now, is horrifying. I served nine years in the U.S. Marine Corps, for five of those years I served in the elite Marine Special Operation Forces - the Marine Raiders. I took an oath to defend our Constitution, and my oath to this country will never expire. When I ran last year, we had one of the closest races in the country. I fell short by less than 10,000 votes. But this year, all eyes are on this seat. It’s one of the top races in the country because Republicans only need to net FIVE seats to regain our majority and take the country back from the intolerant and radical Left. I’m running for Congress in Minnesota’s 2nd district because the current 'leaders' have sold out our children’s future to the radicals who wish to destroy the American dream. Let’s take our country back. In Service, Tyler Kistner Father. Husband. Marine Veteran. | | PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

body:
So we need to know: Will you DEFEND Speaker Pelosi and CONDEMN Kevin McCarthy for his disgusting comments? | | | **_GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy: "It would be hard not to hit" Nancy Pelosi with the Speaker's Gavel_**

---
| **YOUR URGENT RESPONSE NEEDED:**

This is DISGUSTING.

Kevin McCarthy -- the top Republican fighting to destroy our Majority -- just shamefully joked about hitting Nancy Pelosi with the Speaker's Gavel.

We won't stand for his disrespect any longer -- so we're calling on 15,OOO Democrats to CONDEMN McCarthy and his vile actions.**

So, will you DEFEND Speaker Pelosi and CONDEMN Kevin McCarthy for his disgusting comments?**
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---

We're outraged.

**Kevin McCarthy --_the Republican fighting to become the next Speaker of the House_ \-- just shamefully joked about hitting Nancy Pelosi with the Speaker's Gavel.**

We wish we could say we're surprised \-- but we're not.

Kevin McCarthy and his House Republicans have sworn absolute loyalty to Donald Trump and his brand of divisive, destructive politics.

**So make no mistake: If we allow Republicans to defeat our House Majority, we can expect even more Trump-like attacks on Speaker Pelosi and women everywhere.**

We can't allow that to happen \-- but we can't defend our House Majority without support from this INCREDIBLE grassroots team.
**[So we need to know: Will you DEFEND Speaker Pelosi and CONDEMN Kevin McCarthy for his disgusting comments?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/d30Et6D39YH_)** | [YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---

Thanks,

DCCC

body:
Welcome to Team Scheller's newsletter! We are fully into the swing of Summer and I have some updates! The House is officially out on recess for th **Scheller for Congress Newsletter** | | [](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=fc673b09adf441acb1535774778b0e2f&_e=qXMqdKt7vWXgROHNRWsNNXIXkWvusVReu5cwr521rPgDjY1c6kGmf3FdPqEaPBKK1j2QcFScAK7tvb1WOfMKnR98t-8vVowz8nEIcPfI5ocSnw73yN2DTexImznYuFProbaE1jPhPRzAMJShKeorGH5qUFOXb7HHq2td2OopsnssodqHiWFQXQH-Qneaa23WCg6H_vJADobG6KrbMieLKr0cnr8WYiYdCU0TfdwFZCDmnlBDmdU9UAH5cd9HP2oSZny6thE9W9wahT3aCmd0HmjyWWdPoQUyTVTAd3NidBo%3D) | [](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=fc673b09adf441acb1535774778b0e2f&_e=qXMqdKt7vWXgROHNRWsNNUvpl139EhI-fUAEYG_hTcclUfvT0RMIDro2iZQD3v0vPYIL0vzwGa03f96qs4h3sKBgo8ghrPmW7OKHH6seRJ-5H2fgj6udTKSgLSc2--pyegoZ2VpZru7cG4eok6_dODuuFenMhKtcWZOcIt00dwUsMEsKI1EuGsjxYyBGaZlg-UsQvHVnNgPDFoRnL8qT2u8SL7LDAjvBRyYaLLd9vVOEJNq6Eym6LqUjm4bOAjhRClSBha2nnw3EJcZKmtYn3Q%3D%3D)
---|---
[**Sign Up!**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=fc673b09adf441acb1535774778b0e2f&_e=qXMqdKt7vWXgROHNRWsNNfSsyzVUmz0lDIBUZbXNtpUdK1TY4qNtJ9dYTjFTCK0ZnVshhMINTXgQqR7DcN9QBYKX4Glhrsj-UzVhifOfz8M8iOektq3ZySM47JWaw8ju1AukPx9cMw4hEMEprElGKJ6EV3R7oynNIYiHNLdxZ7aZ_RNgyy4xT787zoDil7Wy1-PeQqrQvhM2T1LL23AIfg3YD0TDZSQYXERmsy4wZAk4lho5aStPjw_Dn1u5LgSy32QugHSl9SJrGPYilaqgtw%3D%3D)
Team -

Welcome back to our Newsletter! The Summer is flying by and school is on the horizon. One of the offices up this year is School Board and this year we are reminded of how important our School Board elections are. I have heard from parents all over the district how concerned they are over the direction of our schools and I am amazed by the level of involvement that local parents and groups have committed to our children having a solid in person education. Please find out who is running for your local school board and help them ensure that our students are learning a true curriculum like writing, math, and science and not Critical Race Theory or as it should be called, "State sponsored racism".

For those of you who were not aware, on July 15th, Republicans offered an [amendment](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=fc673b09adf441acb1535774778b0e2f&_e=qXMqdKt7vWXgROHNRWsNNZVVuw7buHBjpO5BktPHqRrBh0d4MArxDqNKbgyh-6lLerJiMRFwTEVOMK8LMRKtw77soIqMvZca4Gv7AG-D1VTajy6l_vdJ3wOJxse0RvAsrn7bhyo6WQH53Q_MP-gspbbI6OOv511nQRPsODCQh2grGPFZ-0Nm6cBoE47SZJpo7axe673lw6GJWmciQ12U3gYzt6k_TkMxr7P6duWWKUmZzRdeRCYV0sziD9hydt7wm8Y7VlDV4q4SM5cwBFWxD1Zkf0w0JUpMM7Orhev_wYtoQau472S8jljd1PaOr5yEJ1w-f41bzaHmxB4mw9SU7V7-KiSN326h8Mifdtqi41w%3D) that would prohibit the Department of Education to use grants to coerce states/school districts into implementing curriculum or teaching strategies (like CRT) that violate Title VI of the Civil Rights Act, which prohibits discrimination of children on the basis of race, color, or national origin.

**[_Susan Wild voted against it._](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=fc673b09adf441acb1535774778b0e2f&_e=qXMqdKt7vWXgROHNRWsNNZVVuw7buHBjpO5BktPHqRrBh0d4MArxDqNKbgyh-6lLerJiMRFwTEVOMK8LMRKtw80xy6ngaTuspwSMoqjrF1Xo7mUmTeTeVBQtsOSXaKJvrYK0-jXeJGw5RY9uTiBvz44-QEWpkClXnwytd8MaTM-ztZd0S55iLaTHkIqyhpnpLi7WYj1eGhvjFXptrKkSfAC_6icX0c8yeH50Kyd1BiCFtjH3bpPPKiCBhJA_oT59v57PQ-kfbYcjegTXBJ8XyDhuydF9JToGjLlKe_NUAMGTLmnz6vnCIVrjHHeKdZuZ9_fqWNCvwC_cYwvdwarP1rnDnDK84m1HhfvOkpTuYO8%3D)**

I am 100% supportive of candidates who are running to make sure our School Boards are represented by parents who care that their children are getting the education that will set them up for success further in life and I hope you will join me and show up to the polls to support them this November. If you have any questions about who is running for your local School Board, contact the campaign at info@schellerforcongress.com and we would be happy to pass along information relating to the election!
|
