**_What has been happening in DC_**

_The Opioid Crisis _
More than 1,000 pounds of the deadly fentanyl drug were seized at the border in June and House Democrats have voted against several amendments in recent days that would have strengthened penalties for distributing fentanyl, as the deadly drug continues to spread havoc through the United States at record pace. Last week, Democrats in the House Judiciary Committee blocked an amendment to H.R. 1693 that would have ensured that anyone convicted of fentanyl-related crimes would not receive a reduced sentence.

On June 30th, a New Jersey Republican, Chris Smith offered an amendment asking Treasury and the State Department to issue a report identifying officials or other people in China who were involved in the production of fentanyl and its trafficking to the U.S. One would think that everyone would vote to hold China accountable no?

_[Susan Wild voted against the amendment.](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=fc673b09adf441acb1535774778b0e2f&_e=qXMqdKt7vWXgROHNRWsNNZVVuw7buHBjpO5BktPHqRo5QnXbOKPE6A2QpfGUYayLGXs9osiCNnOwNO8AT60pZ2r5_1iuQ98qwnEgGy04Od8whnQjHtqAdsI1ck-GWNd7CZk3PD1io1rICShQa1wlmd7ArzGoXEt729eyKmH23NHm5eMtz1Rd0xOgifKCPErDPmzx4M7wW8HBU0bpnKMGDJIRCC10ISFe5K_bCdMaVJlrjiWX6qqcxKLT4P6CBA5VS_66p1LsxiW02vnnQHJpQBhya6vsXzgZUl7fo4AEogPfenhgtqzTaflphSjI8Z-rC4CMqC3PbdyKvi2-sA9c80JejTZHUkDvFN7EDtthMgw%3D)_

I know first hand how devastating this opioid epidemic is and I am tired of the excuses from our leaders who say that they are working to end the opioid epidemic in America and right here in Pennsylvania and then turn right around and vote along party lines against that interest. When I am in Congress, I will tirelessly pursue policies that will work to end opioid addiction in America, because I have been there and know what it takes to escape the grip of addiction.

_The Border_

If it feels like we talk about this a lot, I apologize but it is necessary. Recently you have heard from many representatives including Susan Wild that COVID is still the biggest threat that we as Americans face and she is doing everything possible to protect us. In theory, doesn't that mean that she would not vote for anything that would make the spread of COVID-19 easier? Well, Susan doesn't let facts get in the way of her narrative.

On July 28th, the House voted on whether or not to consider a bill that [ensures critical border health protections remain in place.](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=fc673b09adf441acb1535774778b0e2f&_e=qXMqdKt7vWXgROHNRWsNNT42jQYNnwT4IcGwcwbfAGzt9epoSdtQKP-XC6yVfNq7n_c5B5_H2EtZf9dHxUo6q7iE9vQAc8eUW2URYbNFcXpkpQfueyqQYXVasN7rxvdjj7cLJuyRP777VjeMtdGRZSQmxgwMTnaueQ2kFB64pCGyuhQDyVoHogXzXk134neiBTj8OLWkynTSJc1uwtiYVD4ngIYhbQ-2vuOrg7rT5vWzSUa0EE6ssPMBAEfIHZ7c6WCMPlJxtlgIynRJmcMFMeqwWWcKJDtG745hAyWd3XkapuPimO5Yvv0-qTMu3C0BqB3BjMKuISjex8tO_sIaTjjTB6u7zTf7RPDHMzPsu7c%3D)

This critical bill would maintain the authority to restrict border crossings to protect Americans from COVID-19 and Susan Wild voted against even considering the bill because although Americans can be subject to new lock down policies, she thinks our southern border should be open and at the end of the day, that radical policy trumps keeping Americans and Pennsylvanians safe.

[Every day, Joe Biden is spending $3 million per day to not secure our southern border.](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=fc673b09adf441acb1535774778b0e2f&_e=qXMqdKt7vWXgROHNRWsNNXTOG46sfiiOYc3ZzIbVtE4eL071WwlfMVIShxDOxJccZwD1nvmwUmJypD3MiSu2so3eacquWziFEngDtOIpP6c8QEnxkP9u0jaRjstaoMdqJA7OFJVBs4w7V0CV270DOTR7ZrXdWC0T3arY_CVy9pMOBty8-7FNy2TErKSCay6AF33JcsLXxo8R5ddXKKxAK24BwksXskO9zAdB5-wD9AReVI9oBG9SIBB4ABGQO5XhMuaaxIg1Vs8nyOpMUgBtkKIkHh4dJIUk9XZB9c7n6dnv7Dt-X38hb3EO5LSg9PMPOmYOWj7gJVtZUKONieaoaw%3D%3D) Enough is enough, the southern border is a humanitarian crisis and radical leftists in Washington are ensuring the crisis is not solved so they can continue to have talking points to give to their base.

clean_body: Welcome to Team Scheller's newsletter! We are fully into the swing of Summer and I have some updates! The House is officially out on recess for th Scheller for Congress Newsletter | | | ---|--- Team - Welcome back to our Newsletter! The Summer is flying by and school is on the horizon. One of the offices up this year is School Board and this year we are reminded of how important our School Board elections are. I have heard from parents all over the district how concerned they are over the direction of our schools and I am amazed by the level of involvement that local parents and groups have committed to our children having a solid in person education. Please find out who is running for your local school board and help them ensure that our students are learning a true curriculum like writing, math, and science and not Critical Race Theory or as it should be called, "State sponsored racism". For those of you who were not aware, on July 15th, Republicans offered an that would prohibit the Department of Education to use grants to coerce states/school districts into implementing curriculum or teaching strategies (like CRT) that violate Title VI of the Civil Rights Act, which prohibits discrimination of children on the basis of race, color, or national origin. I am 100% supportive of candidates who are running to make sure our School Boards are represented by parents who care that their children are getting the education that will set them up for success further in life and I hope you will join me and show up to the polls to support them this November. If you have any questions about who is running for your local School Board, contact the campaign at info@schellerforcongress.com and we would be happy to pass along information relating to the election! | Check out our video for Biden's visit last week! | What has been happening in DC The Opioid Crisis More than 1,000 pounds of the deadly fentanyl drug were seized at the border in June and House Democrats have voted against several amendments in recent days that would have strengthened penalties for distributing fentanyl, as the deadly drug continues to spread havoc through the United States at record pace. Last week, Democrats in the House Judiciary Committee blocked an amendment to H.R. 1693 that would have ensured that anyone convicted of fentanyl-related crimes would not receive a reduced sentence. On June 30th, a New Jersey Republican, Chris Smith offered an amendment asking Treasury and the State Department to issue a report identifying officials or other people in China who were involved in the production of fentanyl and its trafficking to the U.S. One would think that everyone would vote to hold China accountable no? I know first hand how devastating this opioid epidemic is and I am tired of the excuses from our leaders who say that they are working to end the opioid epidemic in America and right here in Pennsylvania and then turn right around and vote along party lines against that interest. When I am in Congress, I will tirelessly pursue policies that will work to end opioid addiction in America, because I have been there and know what it takes to escape the grip of addiction. The Border If it feels like we talk about this a lot, I apologize but it is necessary. Recently you have heard from many representatives including Susan Wild that COVID is still the biggest threat that we as Americans face and she is doing everything possible to protect us. In theory, doesn't that mean that she would not vote for anything that would make the spread of COVID-19 easier? Well, Susan doesn't let facts get in the way of her narrative. On July 28th, the House voted on whether or not to consider a bill that This critical bill would maintain the authority to restrict border crossings to protect Americans from COVID-19 and Susan Wild voted against even considering the bill because although Americans can be subject to new lock down policies, she thinks our southern border should be open and at the end of the day, that radical policy trumps keeping Americans and Pennsylvanians safe. Enough is enough, the southern border is a humanitarian crisis and radical leftists in Washington are ensuring the crisis is not solved so they can continue to have talking points to give to their base. | Join us for ourInaugural"Shooting with Scheller" Event! | Check Out These Photos From Around the District!
